## Summary

<!-- one or two lines — what are you changing and why -->

## Kind of change

- [ ] Correction (typo, broken link, wrong fact)
- [ ] Expansion (added more detail to an existing page)
- [ ] New page (add to `nav` in `mkdocs.yml`)
- [ ] Citation / reference addition
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Site infrastructure (workflow, theme, config)

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional-commit PR title (`docs:`, `fix:`, `feat:`, …)
- [ ] If you added or changed a factual claim, I cited an authoritative source
- [ ] I previewed the rendered output (either locally via `mkdocs serve` or in GitHub's raw Markdown view)
- [ ] No private / proprietary content introduced (no references to the private `kfish` repo's internals)

## Anything reviewers should know

<!-- e.g. "waiting on an answer from @xxxx before merging", "this supersedes #N" -->
